title: An Improved Morse Index Bound of Min-Max Minimal Hypersurfaces
abstract: In this paper, we give an improved Morse index bound of minimal hypersurfaces from Almgren-Pitts min-max construction in any closed Riemannian manifold $M^{n+1}$ $(n+1 \geq 3$), which generalizes a result by X. Zhou \cite{zhou_multiplicity_2019} for $3 \leq n+1 \leq 7$. The novel techniques are the construction of hierarchical deformations and the restrictive min-max theory. These techniques do not rely on bumpy metrics, and thus could be adapted to many other min-max settings.
comment: 30 Pages. Minor revision: typos corrected; more references added; figures added to illustrate main techniques. Comments are welcome
